deliverable: Polished 16:9 repository hero image for VibeCanvas
purpose: GitHub README header, repository social preview, and launch announcement
audience: Developers building agent-native image generation workflows
scene: A calm, minimal creative workspace where a visual canvas connects prompt cards, reference images, edit masks, and generated artifacts into one coherent workflow
subject: An original abstract canvas symbol formed from a rounded frame and a flowing image ribbon, communicating iteration, control, and visual creation
key_details: subtle nodes suggesting generation, editing, review, and version history
the symbol must remain recognizable at small social-card size
composition: Place the symbol on the left third. Reserve the right half as a quiet text-safe region. Keep generous margins for 16:9 social-card cropping and a clear three-level hierarchy
style: Warm humanistic technology editorial design with tactile paper and ceramic cues, restrained vector-meets-soft-3D rendering, original and non-infringing
lighting: Soft diffused studio light with gentle depth and no dramatic glow
palette: Warm clay, oatmeal, muted terracotta, fog blue, charcoal, and off-white

text.hierarchy: Project name large and bold; descriptor smaller beneath it

typography: Clean modern grotesk, strong contrast, crisp and highly legible
constraints: render the project name exactly once
use no unrelated logos, watermarks, code screenshots, browser chrome, or stock robot imagery
do not combine multiple unrelated visual metaphors
keep the background visually quiet behind the text
